title: perularia fuscescens
side_effects: Perularia fuscescens can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts has been linked to kidney damage, respiratory issues, and irregular heartbeat. Additionally, using perularia fuscescens without proper medical supervision can lead to interactions with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using perularia fuscescens or any other herbal remedy.
